scripts.build:zip: rm -f store-assets/skillbridge.zip && zip -r store-assets/skillbridge.zip manifest.json _locales/ src/ assets/icons/ -x '*.DS_Store'
scripts.build:firefox:zip: npm run build:firefox && cd dist/firefox && rm -f ../../store-assets/skillbridge-firefox.zip && zip -r ../../store-assets/skillbridge-firefox.zip . -x '*.DS_Store'
